# Test SVG generation
class MockApp\(main.TaskPanelApp.__bases__[0]\):

app_mock.panel_color = '#1e1e2e'
app_mock.panel_opacity = 90
svg = main.TaskPanelApp.generate_panel_svg\(app_mock, '#1e1e2e', 0.9\)

assert 'hint-stretch-borders' in svg
print\('SVG generation OK, length:', len\(svg\)\)

# Test PanelPreviewWidget configs
